Home / Services / Bathroom Remodeling

Bathroom Remodeling

Upgrade your bathroom with our expert remodeling services in Miami.

Veloz Contractors specializes in creating luxurious and functional bathrooms that meet the unique needs of Miami homeowners. Whether you're looking to update an outdated bathroom or create a spa-like retreat, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We understand the challenges of bathroom remodeling in Miami, from dealing with moisture and humidity to maximizing space in smaller bathrooms.

Our team can handle every aspect of your bathroom remodel, including tile installation, vanity replacement, shower and tub upgrades, and custom lighting. We partner with leading suppliers to offer a wide selection of high-quality materials and fixtures. From modern, minimalist designs to classic, elegant styles, we can create a bathroom that perfectly complements your home.

We'll also ensure that your new bathroom is water-efficient and environmentally friendly. We can install low-flow toilets, showerheads, and faucets to help you conserve water and save money on your utility bills. Let Veloz Contractors transform your bathroom into a relaxing and rejuvenating oasis.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your vision and create a detailed design plan.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the perfect tiles, vanities, and fixtures.
  3. 03 Step 3: Demolition & Installation – Our skilled team handles all aspects of the renovation process.
  4. 04 Step 4: Final Touches & Inspection – We ensure your complete satisfaction with the finished bathroom.

Benefits

  • Increased Home Value
  • Improved Functionality
  • Enhanced Aesthetics
  • Personalized Spa Retreat

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the most popular bathroom remodeling trend in Miami?

Spa-inspired bathrooms with features like rainfall showers and freestanding tubs are very popular.

How can I maximize space in a small bathroom?

We can help you choose space-saving fixtures and storage solutions to make the most of your space.

What type of tile is best for a Miami bathroom?

Porcelain and ceramic tiles are excellent choices for their durability and water resistance.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with bathroom remodeling? Contact us today.
